decisions.question: Disambiguation UX for niwa go [target]: shadowing treatment and decoration
Caching policy: memoize config/state reads or raw per-tab-press calls
Completion helper organization: where do completeWorkspaceNames/completeInstanceNames/completeRepoNames live, and how does this interact with the EnumerateRepos helper extraction?
decisions.chosen: Option 4: closures in internal/cli/completion.go; data-listing fns in owning packages (workspace.EnumerateRepos, config.ListRegisteredWorkspaces)

decisions.question: Test strategy: unit only, two-tier (unit + functional), or include shell-live
decisions.chosen: Two-tier: unit tests + functional tests via niwa __complete

decisions.question: Install-path changes: whether installer or tsuku recipe need changes to ship completion on by default
decisions.chosen: No changes; both paths already ship completion

decisions.question: niwa go -r scoping when -w is set: sorted-first instance, union across instances, or require -w <inst> pass
Description content in decorated candidates for niwa go [target]: kind only, kind + path, or kind + instance qualifier
